name: Noise Table
description: A collection of generative audio tools in a VHS-style launcher. Make the next great ambient album or just vibe out.

name: Windsome
description: A browser-based step sequencer inspired by hardware instruments like the Elektron Digitakt.

name: Good Song Club
description: A small social media platform that allows you to share good songs with your friends. Think of it as a social layer on top of YouTube Music or a worldwide shared playlist. 💛

name: Concrete 95
description: Sound design app inspired by Musique Concrete with a Windows 95 aesthetic. Layer synth pads, melodies, and found sound randomly fetched from freesound.org.

name: BPM Game
description: A very niche web-based game where a player listens to a metronome and guesses the BPM.

name: Dig This
description: Web app that gives you a random music recommendation using the Discogs API
skills: React, Node.js, Discogs API, Product Design

name: Mood Palace
description: A web repository that allows me to upload ambient audio for anyone to listen

name: Lever
description: A Figma plugin I built which provides a consistent structure to Figma files.
